name: Twists
overview: The alien hamster Ziggy and his flying squirrel sister Ruby are hunting for the source of superpowers — the intelligent asteroid Pouncequick. On Earth, Pouncequick has already managed to endow ordinary cat Sol and dog Roy with superpowers. Now Ziggy and Ruby have no choice but to take the animals into space and reveal the secrets of the universe to them. It turns out that there is a whole Union of Planets created by dinosaurs that left Earth millions of years ago. The director of the Star Academy, Tyrannosaurus Shikizer, accepts Sol and Roy as cadets, and appoints Ziggy and Ruby in charge of terrestrial animals. Calling themselves the "Krutiks", the magnificent four are now ready for any superhero missions, whether it's helping the inhabitants of different planets, searching for Pouncequick, or fighting the mysterious villainess Iron Harpy.
